Notice Of Renewed Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One
Off Calendar Dec-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Demian I. Oksenender, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Kevin Fraser
Maria S. Quintero, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: USAA Casualty Insurance Company.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Kevin Fraser's Renewed Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, is granted in part, denied in part, and moot in part. The motion is granted as to Number 1. The motion is denied as to Numbers 11-13 are irrelevant. The motion is moot as to Number 17 as a supplemental response has been made. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Renewed Motion To Compel Further Responses And Production Of Documents In Response To Request For Production, Set Four
Off Calendar Dec-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Demian I. Oksenender, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Kevin Fraser
Maria S. Quintero, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: USAA Casualty Insurance Company.

RULING AFTER HEARING: Plaintiff Kevin Fraser's Renewed Motion to Compel further Responses and Droduction of Documents in Responses to Request for Production, Set Four is Granted in part and Denied in part. Numbers 1-2 are moot. Numbers 12, 23, and 27 are denied as irrelevant. Numbers 33-36 are denied. Number 47 is Granted as modified. Number 49 is Granted, limited to programs used to calculate for plaintiff's house. Number 50 is Granted, limited to 2000 to present. Respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Demian I. Oksenender, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Kevin Fraser

RULING AFTER HEARING: Plaintiff Kevin Fraser's Renewed Motion To Compel Further Responses And Production Of Documents In Responses To Request For Production, Set Three is DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
